title: Beille 100% Cotton Kitchen Dish Cloths, Machine Washable Reusable Towels, 10pk
description:
Beille’s 10 Pack Cotton Kitchen Dish Cloth Set includes reusable dish cloths designed for everyday kitchen cleaning, drying, and wiping tasks. Made from soft, absorbent 100% cotton, these cloths are suitable for dishes, countertops, sinks, glassware, and small spills. The assorted blue patterns add a clean, classic look to a variety of kitchen styles, while the machine-washable design allows for convenient everyday use and easy care. Ideal for keeping near the sink, in kitchen drawers, or throughout busy cooking and cleanup areas.

Beille 100% Cotton Kitchen Dish Cloths, Machine Washable Reusable Towels, 10pk
Refresh your everyday kitchen routine with Beille’s 10 Pack 100% Cotton Kitchen Dish Cloth Set, a practical and stylish assortment designed for daily cleaning, drying, wiping and food or meal prep tasks. Made from 100% cotton, these reusable dish cloths offer a soft, absorbent feel that makes them a dependable kitchen essential for countertops, dishes, glassware, sinks, spills, and general household cleanup. The assorted blue color palette adds a clean, classic look that works beautifully in farmhouse, coastal, modern, traditional and everyday kitchen spaces.

This value set includes ten dish cloths total, with 2 of each style, giving you plenty of cloths to rotate throughout the week. Keep a few near the sink, store extras in a kitchen drawer, use them while cooking, or set them out for quick access during busy meal prep and cleanup sessions. The classic coordinated blue patterns make the set feel polished and decorative, while still being practical enough for everyday use.

Designed for convenience, these cotton dish cloths are machine washable, making them easy to clean and reuse again and again. Instead of relying on disposable paper towels for every spill or wipe down, this ten-pack gives you a reusable option for daily kitchen chores. Whether you are drying dishes, wiping counters, cleaning up small spills, or adding a finished touch to your kitchen sink or countertop, these 100% cotton dish cloths are a simple, useful, and great value addition to your kitchen linen collection from Beille.
Key Features
  • 100% COTTON DISH CLOTHS: Made from soft, reusable cotton, these dish cloths are designed for everyday kitchen tasks such as drying dishes, wiping counters, cleaning glassware, handling small spills, and keeping your workspace tidy
  • 10 PACK VALUE SET: Includes ten cotton kitchen dish cloths with two of each assorted blue style, giving you a practical everyday set for dish drying, countertop wiping, kitchen cleanup, sink areas, meal prep and household use
  • ASSORTED BLUE DESIGNS: Coordinated blue colors and patterns add a clean, classic look to any kitchen, while blending easily with farmhouse, coastal, modern, traditional and neutral home decor styles
  • MACHINE WASHABLE: These reusable kitchen cloths are machine washable for easy care, making them a practical alternative to disposable paper towels for routine cleaning, drying and everyday kitchen maintenance
  • EVERYDAY KITCHEN ESSENTIAL: Great for use near the sink, on countertops, in kitchen drawers, or as part of a home cleaning routine, this ten pack dish cloth set from Beille is useful for busy kitchens and anywhere around the house
Specifications

UPC: 810131707668
Towel Dimensions: 13" x 11.5"

Material: 100% Cotton
